meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't scale projects (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't scale projects. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Project Template to Scale SaaS Apps
content.seo_description: Learn how to use the Antigravity project template to overcome scaling bottlenecks. A professional checklist for students using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The 'can't scale' bottleneck in student projects is almost always due to rigid, monolithic architecture. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you decouple your business logic from your infrastructure. This allows you to iterate rapidly, modularize your backend services, and deploy horizontally, turning your prototype into a production-ready system.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks coding your first SaaS, but every time you try to add a feature, the foundation cracks. You are stuck in the 'prototype trap'—where code is brittle, debt is mounting, and the dream of scaling remains just out of reach. It is a rite of passage for every developer, but staying there is a choice.

Today, we break that cycle. By implementing the Antigravity project template, you stop fighting your own codebase and start building with architectural intent. We are moving beyond simple scripts to professional-grade systems that grow alongside your ambition. This is where your portfolio transforms from 'academic project' to 'serious engineering'.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Initialize your project structure to prioritize modularity, ensuring that your core logic is isolated from external dependencies.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new modular project structure using the Antigravity template, enforcing strict separation of concerns between API routes, service layers, and data models.

steps.title: Decoupling Data Access
steps.description: Move your database logic into an abstraction layer so you can swap providers without refactoring your entire application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor existing database connections to use the Antigravity repository pattern, ensuring all CRUD operations are abstracted from the controller logic.

steps.title: Service Layer Injection
steps.description: Encapsulate business logic into independent services that can be tested in isolation, preventing the 'god object' anti-pattern.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Decompose the current monolithic service into discrete domain-specific services using the Antigravity injection pattern.

steps.title: Automating Infrastructure as Code
steps.description: Define your infrastructure requirements within the template so that deployment becomes a reproducible, version-controlled process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate infrastructure-as-code manifests for the current project scope, targeting a scalable cloud environment using Antigravity standards.

steps.title: Performance Benchmarking
steps.description: Integrate automated telemetry to identify performance bottlenecks before they manifest in production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement performance monitoring middleware across all endpoints, adhering to the Antigravity observability framework.

pro_tips: Always treat your environment variables as first-class citizens; never hardcode a secret, even in development.
Implement 'Feature Flags' early, allowing you to toggle experimental code without breaking your production build.
Use dependency injection to mock external APIs during testing, which keeps your test suite lightning fast.
Adopt 'Semantic Versioning' for your internal packages to manage breaking changes as your project grows.
Document your architectural decisions in a `/docs/adr` folder to maintain clarity for your future self.
content.next_steps: Once your structure is in place, deploy your MVP to a staging environment and run an automated load test. Identify the slowest service and iterate on its performance using the Antigravity optimization patterns.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the blueprint to build software that doesn't just work, but scales. Stop building prototypes and start building platforms. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
